delete from CedingCoByQtr where Yr = '[Yr]' and per = '[Mo]'
delete from CedingCoByQtrContractUWYR where Yr = '[Yr]' and per = '[Mo]'

insert into CedingCoByQtr (CedingCo,Name,AMBest_Rating,SP_Rating,Yr,Per,Flex1) (select GL,max(Flex1) as Flex1,max(AM_Best) as Flex2,max(S_P) as Flex3,Yr,Period,KeyID from (select GL,Flex1,GLdesc,(case when GLdesc = 'AM Best' then PC else '' end) as AM_Best,(case when GLdesc = 'S&P Global Ratings' then PC else '' end) as S_P,Yr,Period,KeyID from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL <> '' and PCdesc like 'Financial Strength%' and GLdesc in ('AM Best','S&P Global Ratings')) x group by GL,Yr,Period,KeyID)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Contract = '' or Contract = 'UNKNOWN')
update TransX set BusCat = '20' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Y' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP like 'F%'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Y' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(TP) = 4

insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Contract,UWYR,Yr,Period,ReinName,BusCat,Flex2,Flex3) (Select KeyID,Co,Contract,UWYR,Yr,Period,max(ReinName),max(BusCat),max(Flex2),max(Flex3) from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Co,Contract,UWYR,Yr,Period)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL is NULL

update TransX set ReinName = m.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE, TP = m.TRADING_PARTNER, BusCat = m.BUSINESS_CATEGORY_REINS_TYPE from TransX t inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] m on t.Co = m.LEGAL_ENTITY and t.Contract = m.CONTRACT_NO and t.UWYR = m.UW_YEAR where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not t.Contract in ('','UNKNOWN') and not ReinName in (select z.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] z where z.CONTRACT_NO = t.Contract and z.UW_YEAR = t.UWYR and z.LEGAL_ENTITY = t.Co)

update TransX set ReinName = f4.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE, TP = F4.TRADING_PARTNER, BusCat = F4.BUSINESS_CATEGORY_REINS_TYPE from TransX f1 inner join (select f3.contract_no, f3.cedant_reinsurer_code,f3.trading_partner,f3.business_category_reins_type from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] f3 inner join (select CONTRACT_NO, max(UW_YEAR) as UW_YEAR from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] group by COntract_no) f2 on f2.contract_no = f3.contract_no and f2.uw_year = f3.uw_year group by f3.contract_no, f3.cedant_reinsurer_code,f3.trading_partner,f3.business_category_reins_type) f4 on f1.contract = f4.contract_no where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not f1.Contract in ('','UNKNOWN') and not ReinName in (select z.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] z where z.CONTRACT_NO = f1.Contract and z.UW_YEAR = f1.UWYR and z.LEGAL_ENTITY = f1.Co)

update TransX set PC = substring(cast(f2.ceding_co_id as varchar(255)),1,10), PCdesc = substring(f3.name,1,50) from TransX f1 inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[vw_ContractsLatestVersion] f2 on f1.contract = f2.contract_no and f1.uwyr = f2.uw_year inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] f3 on f2.ceding_co_id = f3.company_id

insert into CedingCoByQtrContractUWYR (Co,Contract,UWYR,Yr,Per,CedingCo,ReinType1,ReinType2,BusCat,Flex1,Flex2) (Select Co,Contract,UWYR,Yr,Period,ReinName,Flex2,Flex3,BusCat,PC,PCdesc from TransX  where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

insert into CedingCoByQtr (CedingCo,Yr,Per,SAP_CedingCo,SAP_Name,NAIC,FedID,RSG_CedingCo,RSG_Name,FFH_Aff,ORH_Aff) (select c.CedingCo, c.Yr, c.Per, c.CedingCo, b.Name, b.NAIC, B.FedID ,c.Flex1, c.Flex2,c.ReinType1,c.ReinType2 from (select CedingCo,Yr,Per,max(Flex1) as Flex1,max(Flex2) as Flex2, max(ReinType1) as ReinType1, max(ReinType2) as ReinType2, count(*) as cnt from CedingCoByQtrContractUWYR  where Yr = '2021' and Per = '6' group by CedingCo,Yr,Per) c left join Brokers b on c.CedingCo = b.Broker where c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]')
delete from CedingCoByQtr where CedingCo = ''

update c set NAIC = x.NAIC_COMPANY, FedID = x.FEIN_NUM from CedingCoByQtr c inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] x on c.CedingCo = cast(x.BART_MAP_TO as varchar(20)) and c.RSG_CedingCo = x.COMPANY_ID where coalesce(c.RSG_CedingCo,'') <> '' and coalesce(x.NAIC_COMPANY,'') <> '' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]' and c.SAP_CedingCo is not NULL

update c set NAIC = x.NAIC_COMPANY, FedID = x.FEIN_NUM, RSG_CedingCo = x.COMPANY_ID, Name = x.NAME from CedingCoByQtr c inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] x on c.CedingCo = cast(x.BART_MAP_TO as varchar(20)) and c.RSG_CedingCo = x.COMPANY_ID where coalesce(c.RSG_CedingCo,'') <> '' and coalesce(x.FEIN_NUM,'') <> '' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]' and c.SAP_CedingCo is not NULL

update c set NAIC = x.NAIC_COMPANY, FedID = x.FEIN_NUM, RSG_CedingCo = x.COMPANY_ID, Name = x.NAME from CedingCoByQtr c inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] x on c.CedingCo = cast(x.BART_MAP_TO as varchar(20)) where coalesce(c.RSG_CedingCo,'') = '' and coalesce(x.NAIC_COMPANY,'') <> '' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]' and c.SAP_CedingCo is not NULL

update c set NAIC = x.NAIC_COMPANY, FedID = x.FEIN_NUM, RSG_CedingCo = x.COMPANY_ID, Name = x.NAME from CedingCoByQtr c inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] x on c.CedingCo = cast(x.BART_MAP_TO as varchar(20)) where coalesce(c.RSG_CedingCo,'') = '' and coalesce(x.FEIN_NUM,'') <> '' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]' and c.SAP_CedingCo is not NULL

update c set RSG_CedingCo = x.COMPANY_ID, Name = x.NAME from CedingCoByQtr c inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] x on c.CedingCo = cast(x.BART_MAP_TO as varchar(20)) where coalesce(c.RSG_CedingCo,'') = '' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]' and c.SAP_CedingCo is not NULL

update c set NAIC = x.NAIC_COMPANY, FedID = x.FEIN_NUM from CedingCoByQtr c inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] x on c.CedingCo = cast(x.BART_MAP_TO as varchar(20)) where coalesce(c.NAIC,'') = '' and coalesce(x.NAIC_COMPANY,'') <> '' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]' and c.SAP_CedingCo is not NULL

update c set FedID = x.FEIN_NUM from CedingCoByQtr c inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] x on c.CedingCo = cast(x.BART_MAP_TO as varchar(20)) where coalesce(c.FedID,'') = '' and coalesce(x.FEIN_NUM,'') <> '' and c.Yr = '[Yr]' and c.Per = '[Mo]' and c.SAP_CedingCo is not NULL

update c1 set Name = c1.SAP_Name,Flex2 = 'found', Flex3 = c1.SAP_Name, SP_Name = (case when c2.SP_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), AM_Name = (case when c2.AMBest_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), c1.SP_Rating = c2.SP_Rating, c1.AMBest_Rating = c2.AMBest_Rating, c1.Flex1 = c2.CedingCo from CedingCoByQtr c1 inner join CedingCoByQtr c2 on (c1.SAP_Name = c2.Name or substring(c1.SAP_Name,1,len(c2.Name)) = c2.Name or c1.SAP_Name = substring(c2.Name,1,len(c1.SAP_Name))) and c1.Yr = c2.Yr and c1.Per = c2.Per where c1.Yr = '[Yr]' and c1.Per = '[Mo]' and c1.Name is NULL and not c1.SAP_Name is NULL and c2.SAP_Name is NULL

update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(lower(replace(replace(replace(replace(SAP_Name,'.',''),',',''),' *',''),'*','')),'ü','u') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Name is NULL and not SAP_Name is NULL and Flex3 is NULL

update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(lower(replace(replace(replace(replace(Name,'.',''),',',''),' *',''),'*','')),'ü','u') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Name is not NULL and Flex3 is NULL

update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(Flex3,'corporation','corp'),'insurance','ins'),'company','co'),'mutual','mut'),'casualty','cas') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Flex2 is NULL
update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(replace(replace(replace(Flex3,'méxico','mexico'),'new jersey','nj'),'florida','fl'),'texas','tx') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Flex2 is NULL

update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(Flex3,'international','intl'),'national','natl'),'indemnity','indem'),' mutl ','mut'),'casualty','cas') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Flex2 is NULL

update c1 set Name = c1.SAP_Name,Flex2 = 'found', SP_Name = (case when c2.SP_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), AM_Name = (case when c2.AMBest_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), c1.SP_Rating = c2.SP_Rating, c1.AMBest_Rating = c2.AMBest_Rating, c1.Flex1 = c2.CedingCo from CedingCoByQtr c1 inner join CedingCoByQtr c2 on (substring(c1.Flex3,1,17) = substring(c2.Flex3,1,17) or substring(c1.Flex3,1,len(c2.Flex3)) = c2.Flex3 or c1.Flex3 = substring(c2.Flex3,1,len(c1.Flex3))) and c1.Yr = c2.Yr and c1.Per = c2.Per where c1.Yr = '[Yr]' and c1.Per = '[Mo]' and c1.Name is NULL and not c1.SAP_Name is NULL and c2.SAP_Name is NULL
update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(replace(replace(replace(Flex3,'american','am'),'america','am'),'north amer','n am'),'amer ','am ') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Flex2 is NULL
update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(replace(replace(replace(Flex3,'general','gen'),'genl','gen'),'assr','asr'),'seguros','se') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Flex2 is NULL

update c1 set Name = c1.SAP_Name,Flex2 = 'found', SP_Name = (case when c2.SP_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), AM_Name = (case when c2.AMBest_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), c1.SP_Rating = c2.SP_Rating, c1.AMBest_Rating = c2.AMBest_Rating, c1.Flex1 = c2.CedingCo from CedingCoByQtr c1 inner join CedingCoByQtr c2 on (substring(c1.Flex3,1,17) = substring(c2.Flex3,1,17) or substring(c1.Flex3,1,len(c2.Flex3)) = c2.Flex3 or c1.Flex3 = substring(c2.Flex3,1,len(c1.Flex3))) and c1.Yr = c2.Yr and c1.Per = c2.Per where c1.Yr = '[Yr]' and c1.Per = '[Mo]' and c1.Name is NULL and not c1.SAP_Name is NULL and c2.SAP_Name is NULL
update CedingCoByQtr set Flex3 = replace(Flex3,' ins','') where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Flex2 is NULL

update c1 set Name = c1.SAP_Name,Flex2 = 'found', SP_Name = (case when c2.SP_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), AM_Name = (case when c2.AMBest_Rating = '' then '' else c2.Name end), c1.SP_Rating = c2.SP_Rating, c1.AMBest_Rating = c2.AMBest_Rating, c1.Flex1 = c2.CedingCo from CedingCoByQtr c1 inner join CedingCoByQtr c2 on (substring(c1.Flex3,1,17) = substring(c2.Flex3,1,17) or substring(c1.Flex3,1,len(c2.Flex3)) = c2.Flex3 or c1.Flex3 = substring(c2.Flex3,1,len(c1.Flex3))) and c1.Yr = c2.Yr and c1.Per = c2.Per where c1.Yr = '[Yr]' and c1.Per = '[Mo]' and c1.Name is NULL and not c1.SAP_Name is NULL and c2.SAP_Name is NULL
update CedingCoByQtr set Name = SAP_Name where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Name is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,ReinName,Flex1,GL,Flex2,BusCat,PC,CC,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6) (Select '[batchID]-data2',CedingCo,Name,RSG_CedingCo,RSG_Name,FFH_Aff,AMBest_Rating,SP_Rating,AM_Name,SP_Name,NAIC,FedID from CedingCoByQtr where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and SAP_Name is not NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,ReinName,Flex1,PC,CC,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6) (Select '[batchID]-data3',CedingCo,Name,AMBest_Rating,SP_Rating,AM_Name,SP_Name,NAIC,FedID from CedingCoByQtr where Yr = '[Yr]' and Per = '[Mo]' and Flex1 = '[batchID]')
delete from CedingCoByQtr where Flex1 = '[batchID]'
delete from CedingCoByQtr where Flex1 = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period,Flex2,Flex3,Co, ReinName, BusCat, Contract, UWYR,GL, TP, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],[Mo],'N','N',
